mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PAYMENT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PAYMENT ( payment_id, member_no, payment_amount, payment_method, payment_status, imp_uid, paid_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, #{member_no}, #{total_price}, 'CARD', 'PAID', #{imp_uid}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

SELECT SEQ_RESERVATION.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RESERVATION ( reservation_id, reservation_code, member_no, room_type_id, payment_id, checkin_date, checkout_date, guest_count, total_price, reservation_status, created_at, cancel_deadline, refund_amount ) VALUES ( #{reservation_id}, 'R' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(#{reservation_id}, 4, '0'), #{member_no}, #{room_type_id}, #{payment_id}, TO_DATE(#{check_in}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{check_out}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{guest_count}, #{total_price}, 'CONFIRMED', SYSDATE, #{cancel_deadline}, #{refund_amount} )
